$leadId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['name','phone','createdAt']) && newData.child('name').isString() && newData.child('name').val().length >= 2 && newData.child('name').val().length <= 80 && newData.child('phone').isString() && newData.child('phone').val().length <= 20 && newData.child('email').val().length <= 120 && newData.child('city').val().length <= 60 && newData.child('room').val().length <= 40 && newData.child('style').val().length <= 60 && newData.child('message').val().length <= 1000
